name: StreamSync
author: Bluscream (bluscream_)
short: Unify monitoring of TikTok, Twitch, and YouTube Live into one modular cog.
description: Automatically monitors live streams across multiple platforms, provides voice bridging, and facilitates real-time chat synchronization using robust community libraries (TwitchIO, pytchat).
install_msg: StreamSync cog installed! Use `[p]stream set` to configure your API credentials and `[p]stream monitor` to start bridging.
